top_signals.title: Oil Jumps as US and Iran Trade Strikes, Dispute Hormuz Status
top_signals.summary: Oil jumped as the US and Iran exchanged fresh strikes, with the sides offering conflicting statements on whether the Strait of Hormuz remains open to shipping.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Says It Began Launching More Strikes Against Iran at 5pm ET
top_signals.summary: US Central Command forces began launching more strikes against Iran at 5 p.m. ET today, to continue degrading their ability to attack civilian mariners and commercial ships freely transiting the Strait of Hormuz, according to a post on X.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: McConnell provides health update after long unexplained absence; says he suffered fall
top_signals.summary: McConnell is the longest-serving party leader in Senate history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Graham’s death complicates myriad GOP goals in Congress
top_signals.summary: South Carolina Republican Sen. Lindsey Graham died unexpectedly at 71.

top_signals.title: Who will replace Lindsey Graham in the Senate?
top_signals.summary: South Carolina GOP Rep. Nancy Mace and Gov. Henry McMaster are among the first to be floated for the Senate seat vacated by Lindsey Graham.

top_signals.title: These are America’s 10 worst states to live in for 2026
top_signals.summary: Some states may have low costs and light regulation, but high crime and lack of healthcare are among important factors when people choose where to live.

top_signals.title: Why Japan’s utility poles won’t be disappearing anytime soon
top_signals.summary: Burying Japan's power lines is far more difficult — and expensive — than it looks.
